name: Tomato and Herb Bruschetta - Bon Appetit
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first seven ingredients in a bowl.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
(The tomato mixture can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead. Let it stand at room temperature.)
3. Cut the toasted bread in half.
4. Spoon the tomato mixture onto the bread and serve.
